settings.title: Printer IP Address
settings.desc: Local IP address of the BambuLab printer (e.g. 192.168.1.100)

settings.title: Access Code
settings.desc: Found in printer Settings > WLAN > Access Code

settings.title: Serial Number
settings.desc: Printer serial number (found in Settings or Bambu Studio)

settings.title: Enable Camera Feed
settings.desc: Display live RTSPS stream from the printer. Requires 'LAN Mode Liveview' enabled on the printer (firmware 01.06+)

settings.title: Camera FPS
settings.desc: Frames per second for the camera feed (1-30). Lower values reduce CPU load. Recommended: 5 for Pi 3, 15 for Pi 4+
